anim.description: Grants the animation plugin's default commands and native file pickers to the main window.

content.description: Grants the content plugin's default commands and the native folder picker to the main window.

default.description: Base capabilities for the main window.

mapconv.description: Grants the mapconv plugin's default commands and native file pickers to the main window.

prdownloader.description: Grants the prdownloader plugin's default commands to the main window.

uberstress.description: Grants the uberstress plugin's default commands plus native file dialogs and folder opening to the main window.
